# Role Responsibilities Template

> **How to use this template:** Copy this file into a new document under `docs/` (e.g., `docs/roles/your-role-name.md`). Replace all placeholder text (shown in *italics* or `[brackets]`) with content specific to the role. Remove this instruction block before publishing.

---

## Role Name

*[Insert the official role title, e.g. "Senior QA Engineer" or "Staff Technical Writer"]*

---

## Summary

*[Provide 1–2 sentences describing the primary purpose and value of this role within the team. What does this person own, and why does it matter?]*

---

## Responsibilities

- *[Core responsibility 1 — be specific and action-oriented]*
- *[Core responsibility 2]*
- *[Core responsibility 3]*
- *[Add or remove bullet points as needed]*

## Artifacts Owned

- *[Artifact 1, e.g. "Test plan"]*
- *[Artifact 2, e.g. "Requirements specification"]*
- *[Artifact 3]*

## Acceptance Criteria

*How do we know this role is fulfilling its responsibilities? List observable signals or done criteria:*

- [ ] *[Signal 1, e.g. "Deliverable X reviewed and approved before sprint end"]*
- [ ] *[Signal 2]*
- [ ] *[Signal 3]*

## Onboarding Notes

*Key information for someone new to this role on this team:*

- **Tools & access needed:** *[List tools, systems, or permissions the role requires on day one]*
- **Key documents to read first:** *[Link to relevant process docs, style guides, etc.]*
- **Recurring meetings to join:** *[Stand-up, planning, retros, role-specific syncs]*
- **First 30 days focus:** *[What should someone in this role prioritise in their first month?]*
